name: MAC-10 | 赤金锁链
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A Norse inspired pattern of gold interlocking rings has been applied. We end the way we began; in the dirt
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，赤金扣环图案来源于北欧神话。 就让过去，尘归尘，土归土
